1.name: High Functioning
1.interpretation: Strong WHO Healthy Ageing alignment. Senior is independent, financially stable, and socially engaged.

2.name: Moderate / Mixed Needs
2.interpretation: Mixed profile — some domains stable, others at risk. May benefit from social activation and financial support programs.

3.name: Low Functioning / Multi-domain Risk
3.interpretation: Lowest alignment with all Healthy Ageing domains. Requires immediate multi-domain intervention.
